source_pr.title: plan: support `?` in Order By / Group By / Limit Offset clauses
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Fix #8153 ### What is changed and how it works? * Modify ``parser.ByItem`` to support ``ast.ParamMarkerExpr`` * The prepared statements having parameters in ``OrderByClause`` or ``GroupByClause`` aren't cached ### Check List Tests - Unit test Code changes - Has exported function/method change - Has persistent data change (i.e., ``parser``) Side effects - No Related changes - Need to update the ``parser`` repository (i.e., the parser PR [#27](https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/27)) --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8206)

symptoms: fix a potential sporadic CI error due to the PR #8339 | tk.MustExec(`prepare stmt from 'select * from t order by ? asc'`) (executor/prepared_test.go)
failure_signature: fix a potential sporadic CI error due to the PR #8339 | tk.MustExec(`prepare stmt from 'select * from t order by ? asc'`) (executor/prepared_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: Prepared statements with parameter markers in ORDER BY / GROUP BY were incorrectly considered cacheable, so prepared plan cache could reuse a plan with stale parameter handling; depending on cache hit/miss, results/errors could vary. This PR stabilizes it by marking such statements non-cacheable and handling param markers correctly during prepare/execute.
fix_pattern: Disable prepared plan caching for statements with param markers in ORDER BY / GROUP BY (avoid plan cache dependency).

evidence: evidence: fix a potential sporadic CI error due to the PR #8339 | tk.MustExec(`prepare stmt from 'select * from t order by ? asc'`) (executor/prepared_test.go)

files: executor/prepared.go, executor/prepared_test.go, expression/simple_rewriter.go, expression/util.go, planner/core/cacheable_checker.go, planner/core/cacheable_checker_test.go, planner/core/expression_rewriter.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, executor/executor.go, sessionctx/stmtctx/stmtctx.go, planner/core/errors.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go
